creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
Created attachment 236624
Patch for x11-wm/piewm/Makefile to update WWW & MASTER_SITES entries.

The current WWW entry in x11-wm/piewm /Makefile points to http://www.crynwr.com/piewm/, which no longer seems to exist.

Stefan Eßer suggested making use of the Wayback Machine to get something plausibly useful; he also pointed out that the Wayback Machine could be used to fetch the distfiles.  Accordingly, I have (also) augmented the MASTER_SITES specification to include the Wayback Machine.  While I was there anyway, I also copied the 1.01, 1.02, and 1.03 tarballs from the Wayback Machine to the other locations.

Patch attached.
